privileged_info_summary: The add_inventory_item task operates on synthetic product inventory data stored in CSV format (100 items across Clothing, Home & Garden, Jewelry, Grocery, and Electronics categories). The task requires GUI interaction with NCH Copper Point of Sale, a real commercial Windows/Mac POS software from NCH Software. The specific item to be added ('Organic Green Tea 20pk' in Beverages category at $8.99) does not currently exist in the pre-loaded inventory. The product catalog is synthetic test data, not sourced from a public retail database.
